items.group_name: Table design and physical layout features

model.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE target_catalog.target_schema.tbl_metrics_with_tblproperties
TBLPROPERTIES (
  'prop.owner_team' = 'data_platform',
  'prop.purpose' = 'example_model_template',
  'prop.sensitivity' = 'internal'
)
AS
WITH g8j_tblprops_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g8j_tblprops_shaped AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    CAST(metric_value AS DOUBLE) AS metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g8j_tblprops_source
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts,
  load_dttm
FROM g8j_tblprops_shaped

items.group_name: Table design and physical layout features

model.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE target_catalog.target_schema.tbl_metrics_with_comment
COMMENT 'Example table created from a model template demonstrating the COMMENT clause.'
AS
WITH g8k_comment_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g8k_comment_shaped AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts
  FROM g8k_comment_source
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g8k_comment_shaped

items.group_name: Table design and physical layout features

model.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS target_catalog.target_schema.tbl_metrics_bucketed
USING PARQUET
CLUSTERED BY (business_key)
SORTED BY (event_ts DESC)
INTO 32 BUCKETS
AS
WITH g8v_bucket_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g8v_bucket_source
